title: Convert Decimal to Binary, Octal or Hexadecimal
description:
Given a decimal number and a base (2 for binary, 8 for octal, 16 for hexadecimal), convert the decimal number to the specified base.

Return the result as a string.
hints: Use the modulo operator (%) to get the remainder when dividing by the base.
Build the result string from right to left by prepending each digit.
For bases > 10, use letters a-f for digits 10-15.
